div.head: Memorandum by the Secretary of State to the Director of the Office of Near Eastern and African Affairs (Murray)
div.p: Subject: Iranian Free Port and Railroad Trusteeship

Thank you for your memorandum of the 20th [30th?]. When I was with the President on SaturdayDecember 30, 1944. I raised this question and he indicated that he felt there was no urgency about the matter. He did, however, ask for a memorandum which he could study. I think this must be most carefully drawn up and if George Allen,Chief of the Division of Middle Eastern Affairs. whom I presume
will prepare this for you, will check with Hayden RaynorG. Hayden Raynor, Special Assistant to the Secretary of State. he will give him some ideas which I have on the manner in which the problem should be presented.
